calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-02-2026 Set For Case Management Conference On Jul-08-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories Employment Law (Set Two) To Defendant Maximus Real Estate Partners, Ltd
Off Calendar Mar-25-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

1 - Plaintiff Richaele Affannato's Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories Employment Law (Set Two) To Defendant Maximus Real Estate Partners, Ltd is OFF CALENDAR.

Plaintiff has not demonstrated their moving papers were timely served. (See Code of Civil Procedure section 1005(b) [motion must be filed and served 16 court days before hearing]; Code of Civil Procedure section 1013(a) [service by mail where place of address and place of mailing are within State of adds 5 calendar days to the period of notice]; see Code of Civil Procedure section 1010.6(a)(3)(B) [service by email adds two court days to "any period of notice"].) Plaintiff served their moving papers on Defendants electronically on 3/2/2026, which is not 16 court days plus two court days before 3/25/2026, the hearing date noticed.

The court notes it is not inclined to expend scarce resources adjudicating merits discovery motions in settled cases, nor do parties have a right to such adjudication.

Prior to the hearing, Plaintiff shall lodge by email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org a proposed order repeating the above verbatim.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
